storage.notes: Has a microSD slot (capacity not confirmed) and supports BitVision app cloud/P2P access.

features: supports TCP/IP, ICMP, HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, DHCP, DNS, DDNS, RTP, RTSP, RTCP, NTP, SMTP
release_notes: Longse is a Chinese OEM manufacturer whose hardware and firmware platform underpins a large share of unbranded/white-label budget cameras sold on Amazon and AliExpress under many different storefront names. This is one of the most searched-for Longse SKUs by owners trying to identify unbranded hardware.

frigate.notes: Bare-root RTSP path confirmed as the top crowd-sourced connection method for this exact model (iSpyConnect/Agent DVR community database). ONVIF auto-discovery is also reported to work.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF 2.4 conformance explicitly stated by the retailer/manufacturer documentation.

blue_iris.notes: Not independently confirmed for this specific model, but ONVIF support makes it a likely fit.
